_note: TTA / ensemble robustness on ChestMNIST-224 (NIH ChestX-ray14, 2000 labeled test images) with densenet121-res224-nih. macro-AUROC over 14 pathologies. Systems cost measured by running the views as one batch (spare-capacity 'free' robustness). Augmentations: mild rotation/contrast/brightness, no h-flip.
